'''鈭歮-v-n''' ('''kamavan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quell|quell]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-v-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quell|quell]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-v-n
|-
! Lemma
| kamavan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimavan|thimavan]] || [[word:jimavan|jimavan]] || [[word:shimavan|shimavan]] || [[word:kimavan|kimavan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumavan|thuthumavan]] || [[word:jujumavan|jujumavan]] || [[word:shushumavan|shushumavan]] || [[word:kukumavan|kukumavan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumavan|thumavan]] || [[word:jumavan|jumavan]] || [[word:shumavan|shumavan]] || [[word:kumavan|kumavan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumavan|thumavan]] || [[word:jumavan|jumavan]] || [[word:shumavan|shumavan]] || [[word:kumavan|kumavan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themavan|themavan]] || [[word:jemavan|jemavan]] || [[word:shemavan|shemavan]] || [[word:kemavan|kemavan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomavan|thothomavan]] || [[word:jojomavan|jojomavan]] || [[word:shoshomavan|shoshomavan]] || [[word:kokomavan|kokomavan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomavan|thomavan]] || [[word:jomavan|jomavan]] || [[word:shomavan|shomavan]] || [[word:komavan|komavan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomavan|thomavan]] || [[word:jomavan|jomavan]] || [[word:shomavan|shomavan]] || [[word:komavan|komavan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙mavan|th忙mavan]] || [[word:j忙mavan|j忙mavan]] || [[word:sh忙mavan|sh忙mavan]] || [[word:k忙mavan|k忙mavan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamavan|thathamavan]] || [[word:jajamavan|jajamavan]] || [[word:shashamavan|shashamavan]] || [[word:kakamavan|kakamavan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamavan|thamavan]] || [[word:jamavan|jamavan]] || [[word:shamavan|shamavan]] || [[word:kamavan|kamavan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamavan|thamavan]] || [[word:jamavan|jamavan]] || [[word:shamavan|shamavan]] || [[word:kamavan|kamavan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamavan|shamavan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamavan|goshamavan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamavan|gokishamavan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamavan眉|shamavan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamavankn眉|goshamavankn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamavan眉|gokishamavan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamavansh毛|shamavansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamavanksh毛|goshamavanksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamavansh毛|gokishamavansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamavanro|shamavanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamavankro|goshamavankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamavanro|gokishamavanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamavanmu|shamavanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamavankmu|goshamavankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamavanmu|gokishamavanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamavansher|shamavansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamavanksher|goshamavanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamavansher|gokishamavansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamavang|shamavang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamavankng|goshamavankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamavang|gokishamavang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamavanya|shamavanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamavankya|goshamavankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamavanya|gokishamavanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamavanyam|shamavanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamavankyam|goshamavankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamavanyam|gokishamavanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamavan眉sh毛|shamavan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamavankn眉sh毛|goshamavankn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamavan眉sh毛|gokishamavan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamavan眉ro|shamavan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamavankn眉ro|goshamavankn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamavan眉ro|gokishamavan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamavan眉mu|shamavan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamavankn眉mu|goshamavankn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamavan眉mu|gokishamavan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamavansh毛n眉|shamavansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamavanksh毛n眉|goshamavanksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamavansh毛n眉|gokishamavansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamavansh毛ro|shamavansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamavanksh毛ro|goshamavanksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamavansh毛ro|gokishamavansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamavansh毛mu|shamavansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamavanksh毛mu|goshamavanksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamavansh毛mu|gokishamavansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamavanron眉|shamavanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamavankron眉|goshamavankron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamavanron眉|gokishamavanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamavanrosh毛|shamavanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamavankrosh毛|goshamavankrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamavanrosh毛|gokishamavanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamavanromu|shamavanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamavankromu|goshamavankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamavanromu|gokishamavanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamavanmun眉|shamavanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamavankmun眉|goshamavankmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamavanmun眉|gokishamavanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamavanmush毛|shamavanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamavankmush毛|goshamavankmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamavanmush毛|gokishamavanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamavanmuro|shamavanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamavankmuro|goshamavankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamavanmuro|gokishamavanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
